summary: W-9 Management feature testing complete. All requested features verified working: Admin login with code 4399, W-9 Review section removed, Edit Employee modal shows W-9 documents with view/download/delete/upload options, Employee dashboard shows W-9s with view/download buttons (no delete for employees).

admin_login_code_4399.details: Admin login with code 4399 successfully redirects to admin dashboard as Matthew Guzman

w9_review_section_removed.details: W-9 Review section is NOT visible on admin dashboard - state exists but no UI renders it

edit_employee_w9_section.details: Edit Employee modal shows 'W-9 Tax Documents' section with: Blank W-9 download, list of employee's W-9 documents, View/Download/Delete icons, 'Add Another W-9' upload button

admin_w9_status_api.details: GET /api/admin/employees/{id}/w9/status returns W-9 documents list with id, filename, status, uploaded_at

employee_dashboard_w9_section.details: Employee dashboard shows 'W-9 Tax Form' section with: IRS W-9 blank form download, 'YOUR W-9 DOCUMENTS' list showing documents with 'On File' status, View/Download buttons, Upload Additional W-9 option

employee_w9_no_delete.details: Employee dashboard W-9 section does NOT show delete buttons - employees can only view/download, admin can delete

w9_status_submitted_not_pending.details: W-9 documents show status 'On File' (frontend) / 'submitted' (backend) instead of 'Pending'

test_credentials.admin_login: Enter code '4399' or '0826' in email field on /login page

seed_data_creation: Used existing employees and W-9 documents from previous test iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: W-9 management fully tested. Key points: 1) W-9 Review section removed from UI but backend endpoints still exist (not used), 2) W-9s now have 'submitted' status instead of 'pending_review', 3) Admin can CRUD W-9s from Edit Employee modal, 4) Employees can view/download their W-9s and upload new ones but cannot delete, 5) Frontend shows 'On File' status for submitted W-9s.
